top_signals.title: U.S. strikes Iran in response to attack on cargo ship in Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: U.S. Central Command said aircraft struck missile and drone storage ​locations and coastal radar sites.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Great British Summer Savings: Tax cut on kids’ meals and days out goes live
top_signals.summary: Tax cut on meals and days out come into force.

top_signals.title: Tokenization firm Securitize eyes early July NYSE debut with $400 million SPAC deal
top_signals.summary: Seeking to debut next week, Securitize will receive roughly $400 million after retaining more than 70% of its SPAC trust.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Wall Street Week | USMCA: Can North America’s Trade Deal Survive?
top_signals.summary: This week, a special edition of Wall Street Week on the USMCA trade deal. The renegotiations are testing the future of an auto industry built on decades of cross-border integration. And, American farmers increasingly depend on exports to Canada and Mexico as other overseas markets become more difficult to access. Plus, years of infrastructure investment have created an energy market that crosses borders more easily than political narratives suggest. Later, can three countries with different priorities still agree on a common economic vision? (Source: Bloomberg)
